queries.question: What functions are there performed by all the HR professionals?
queries.sql: SELECT Functions.description  from Hr_Professionals_Functions join Functions on Hr_Professionals_Functions.functionId = Functions.functionId join Hr_Professionals on Hr_Professionals_Functions.hrProfessionalId = Hr_Professionals.id   GROUP BY Hr_Professionals_Functions.functionId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hr_Professionals_Functions.hrProfessionalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hr_Professionals)

queries.question: What functions are there performed by all the HR professionals?
queries.sql: select hr_professionals.name , functions.description from Hr_Professionals_Functions join Functions on Hr_Professionals_Functions.functionId = Functions.functionId join Hr_Professionals on Hr_Professionals_Functions.hrProfessionalId = Hr_Professionals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?hr_professionals_functions a :Hr_Professionals_Functions .
  ?functions a :Functions .
  ?hr_professionals_functions p:hasFunctions ?functions .
  ?hr_professionals a :Hr_Professionals .
  ?hr_professionals_functions p:hasHr_Professionals ?hr_professionals .
  ?hr_professionals p:name ?name .
  ?functions p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What functions are there performed by all the HR professionals?
